jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
